title: Senior Software Engineer - Indifi Technologies Holdings Services - Apply Now

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Indifi Technologies Holdings Services - Apply Now
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Indifi Technologies Holdings Services. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Senior Software Engineer to strengthen our Agra-based team.

About Indifi Technologies Holdings Services:
Indifi Technologies Holdings Services is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in SQL

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Agra, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Indifi Technologies Holdings Services!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
